contraindications.clinicalRationale: Olmesartan has not been studied in dialysis patients, creating uncertainty about safety and efficacy in this population
contraindications.riskDescription: Unknown safety profile and potential for unpredictable drug exposure in dialysis patients
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider alternative antihypertensive agents with established safety profiles in dialysis patients
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Has not been studied in dialysis patients.

warnings.warningText: AUC is increased 3-fold in patients with severe kidney impairment (CrCl <20 ml/min), but no initial dosage adjustment is recommended for moderate to marked kidney impairment (CrCl <40 ml/min)
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with moderate to severe kidney impairment (CrCl <40 ml/min)
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor closely for hypotension and other adverse effects in patients with CrCl <20 ml/min due to 3-fold increase in drug exposure
